side_effects.description: GHK-Cu causes stinging/spiciness when injected at high concentrations; dilution reduces this effect. KPV is a mast cell stabilizer which helps reduce stinging.

protocol_notes: GHK-Cu stinging is concentration-dependent. Mixing with other peptides dilutes it and reduces sting. KPV stacked with GHK-Cu acts as a mast cell stabilizer to further reduce discomfort. Recommends trying peptides separately first to identify which causes any reaction.
